allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix build issues for production deployment

- Fix TypeScript errors in sticks export route \(padsData null check\)
- Fix AI SDK type compatibility issues \(use ''as any'' for model types\)
- Fix maxTokens -> maxOutputTokens for AI SDK 5 compatibility
- Fix StarterKit.configure\(\) link option removal
- Add lazy initialization for Redis to prevent build-time connections
- Create .env.local for build-time configuration \(no external connections\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 NEXT_BUILD_MODE=true BUILDING=true pnpm run build:*)

Bash(echo "fetch\(''/api/concur/groups'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'':''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({name:''Test Group'', description:''test'', owner1Email:''chris.doran@stickmynote.com'', owner2Email:''chris.doran@stickmynote.com''}\) }\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => console.log\(''RESPONSE:'', JSON.stringify\(d\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "sticky notes playful creative board colorful skeuomorphic" --design-system -p "Stick My Note")
Bash(python .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "sticky notes playful creative board colorful skeuomorphic" --design-system -p "Stick My Note")
Bash(python .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "skeuomorphic paper texture handwritten craft" --domain style -n 5)

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);if\(!j.tool_input.command.startsWith\('git commit'\)\){process.exit\(0\)}const{execSync}=require\('child_process'\);try{const files=execSync\('git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=d',{encoding:'utf8'}\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(f=>/\\.\(ts|tsx\)$/.test\(f\)\);if\(files.length===0\){process.exit\(0\)}const result=execSync\('npx eslint --no-warn-ignored '+files.join\(' '\),{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'ESLint passed on '+files.length+' staged file\(s\).'}}\)\);process.exit\(0\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(JSON.stringify\({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'ESLint found issues in staged files:\\\\n'+e.stdout+'\\\\nPlease fix these before committing.'}}\)\);process.exit\(0\)}}\)")

hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const files=execSync('git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=d',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('
').filter(f=>/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f));if(files.length===0){process.exit(0)}execSync('npx eslint --no-warn-ignored '+files.join(' '),{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']});console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'ESLint passed on '+files.length+' staged file(s).'}}));process.exit(0)}catch(e){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'ESLint found issues in staged files:
'+(e.stdout||'')+'
Please fix these before committing.'}}));process.exit(0)}})"
